# Tour RAG API

> Multi-tenant RAG chatbot API for East African safari and trek operators.

Base URL: https://tourragapi.vercel.app
Docs: https://tourragapi.vercel.app/docs
Demo: https://tourragapi.vercel.app/demo
Integrate: https://tourragapi.vercel.app/integrate

## Endpoints

- GET /api/v1/health
- POST /api/v1/tenants (x-admin-key)
- GET /api/v1/tenants/:id (x-admin-key)
- POST /api/v1/ingest (x-admin-key)
- POST /api/v1/chat (x-api-key tenant)

## Auth

- Tenant chat: header x-api-key
- Admin (tenants + ingest): header x-admin-key

## Contact

GitHub: https://github.com/cleven12
Repo: https://github.com/cleven12/chatbot_api
